name: Pumpernickel Bread for the Zojirushi
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the water, molasses, cocoa powder, dry milk, butter, salt, instant coffee, bread flour, rye flour, whole wheat flour, and cornmeal into a baking pan. Tap the container firmly to level out ingredients and sprinkle yeast in the center of the cornmeal.
2. Place the pan securely into the unit and close the lid. Select the BASIC WHITE BREAD setting. Wait 60 seconds, then press START.
3. The COMPLETE light will flash when bread is done. Using hot pads, remove the pan from the unit and pull out the kneading rod.
4. Turn the dough out onto a cooling rack and cool before slicing. Makes 1 loaf.
